notes: v1.14.151 - Card WATERMARK treatment across #ref-grid / #work-grid / .deploy-tools-grid (John-approved Center / 0.40 / 100px). The photoreal icon drops behind the title as a 100px/0.40 ghost; the title becomes the hero pinned low over a dark legibility scrim (::after gradient to #070809); the --icon-glow bloom is intentionally dropped on these cards (it fights overlaid text) and replaced with a calmer saturate(1.25)+soft drop-shadow on the ghost. No markup change, no new assets (reuses the shipped rf/action/tool webps) -> SW precache UNCHANGED. ?legacy=1 byte-identical (the grids render only under body.rd; legacy has none). Three-stamp lockstep 150->151. Gates: node --check x3 inline + the gated GLOWTUNE-DEV script + sw.js, static <style> brace balance 3504/3504 (baseline 3497 + 7 new rules), version.json valid JSON, 0 lone-LF (CRLF-preserving).
